properties.displayName: PowerShell IsDebuggerPresent or Debug API checks in ScriptBlock
properties.description: Detect PowerShell scriptblocks that reference common anti-debugging APIs or strings such as IsDebuggerPresent, CheckRemoteDebuggerPresent, OutputDebugString, or CheckRemoteDebuggerPresent. Attackers may call these to detect attached debuggers.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (ScriptBlockText|contains has "IsDebuggerPresent" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "CheckRemoteDebuggerPresent" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "OutputDebugString" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "NtQueryInformationProcess" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "IsProcessorFeaturePresent")
